name: Oxbow Essentials Adult Rabbit Food — 10lb
shortDescription: Uniform pellet diet formulated to support the unique needs of adult rabbits.
description: Oxbow Essentials Adult Rabbit Food is a nutritionally complete, uniform pellet diet made from pure timothy hay. Formulated for adult rabbits over 1 year of age, it delivers consistent nutrition in every bite and reduces selective feeding.

reviews.title: My bunnies' favourite
reviews.body: Both my Holland Lops have been on Oxbow for 2 years. Perfect weight, great gut health.

name: Kaytee Clean & Cozy White Bedding — 49.2L
shortDescription: Ultra-absorbent paper bedding that absorbs 6x its weight in liquid — virtually dust-free.
description: Kaytee Clean & Cozy Bedding is made from natural paper fiber and absorbs up to 6x its weight in liquid. The virtually dust-free formula is safe for small animals including hamsters, gerbils, rabbits, guinea pigs, and more.
features: Controls odors for up to 2 weeks

name: Midwest Homes for Pets Guinea Habitat Plus
shortDescription: Spacious, easy-to-assemble guinea pig habitat with waterproof canvas bottom.
description: The MidWest Guinea Habitat Plus includes everything you need to house two guinea pigs comfortably. The 8 sq ft floor space meets the recommended minimum for a pair of guinea pigs. Features a waterproof canvas bottom, a divider panel, a hay guard, and a PVC-lined canvas bottom.
features: Folds flat for storage or travel

name: Niteangel Wooden Hamster Wheel — 8.6 inch
shortDescription: Silent, solid-surface wooden wheel — safe for Syrian hamsters and other small animals.
description: The Niteangel Wooden Running Wheel has a solid wooden running surface that is safer for hamster feet than mesh or barred wheels. The ball-bearing mechanism runs virtually silently — perfect for night-time use.
features: Solid wood running surface — paw safe
